problem id: 5d060d45
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHL(2)

examples:
  11011001 -> 01100100
  00100000 -> 00000000
  11010101 -> 01010100
  10011000 -> 00100000
  10111010 -> 10101000
  11110110 -> 10011000
  00001110 -> 00000000
  00101010 -> 10001000
  10100000 -> 00000000
  01011010 -> 00000000

query: 10100001
predicted answer: 00000000
